query: UPDATE users SET email = ?, password = ?, role = ?, first_name = ?, last_name = ?, is_verified = ?, verification_token = ?, verification_token_expires_at = ?, reset_token = ?, reset_token_expires_at = ?, pending_email = ?, email_change_token = ?, email_change_token_expires_at = ?, sessions_valid_after = ?, created_at = ? WHERE id = ?
